name: The Last Camp
short_description: This is a top-down survival-building game blending farming, tower defense, and micromanagement, requiring you to fend off zombie hordes, grow crops, and strategically deploy traps to defend your homestead.
detailed_description:
The Last Camp: Guarding the Last Spark of Humanity at the End of the Dead Tide

The Last Camp "is a top-down post apocalyptic survival strategy game that combines hardcore tower defense, ecological farming, and high-precision micro operations to create the ultimate test of survival in wasteland. You will become the commander of the survivor camp, rebuilding order on the scorched earth of civilization collapse, and building the last line of defense for human civilization with corn stalks and machine guns.

Core survival rules:

Smart Zombie Tide System: Encountering learning enemies - the memory will bypass the trap path of the last death, the honeycomb mother will hatch a swarm of zombies at the place of death, and the imitation ghost will imitate human cries for help to lure and kill your search and rescue team.

Depth strategy dimension:

Seven day destruction cycle: A super zombie swarm occurs every seven days, which can be triggered proactively to obtain rare mutation samples, but sacrifices defense preparation time.

When the last generator stalls, can the torch you ignite illuminate the dawn of civilization?
